description: Links patent applications to their priority applications, establishing priority claims and patent family relationships.

columns.name: prior_appln_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the earlier priority application being claimed.

columns.name: appln_id
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the subsequent patent application claiming priority.

columns.name: prior_appln_seq_nr
columns.description: Sequential number ordering multiple priority claims for the same application.
